# dpastor.eu

> Portfolio and consulting landing page of Daniel Pastor, a sysadmin, DevOps, infrastructure and IT security professional based in Spain.

## Summary

This is the personal portfolio and consulting site of Daniel Pastor (Dani), a systems administrator and IT security professional based in Spain. The site showcases his technical background, projects, and professional services, and includes a blog with articles on sysadmin, DevOps, cybersecurity, and infrastructure topics.

## Architecture

- **Framework**: Astro (Static Site Generation with SSR endpoints)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + Custom Design System (dark space theme)
- **Interactivity**: React Islands (Search, Contact Form, Navigation)
- **Content**: Markdown via Obsidian/Vault CMS workflow
- **Search**: Pagefind (static, client-side, Cmd+K interface)
- **Code blocks**: Expressive Code (syntax highlighting, copy button)
- **Deployment**: Cloudflare Pages

## Navigation

- [Home](/es/) - Landing page with professional summary and tech stack
- [Blog](/es/blog) - Articles and tutorials on sysadmin, DevOps and cybersecurity
- [Projects](/es/projects) - Portfolio of infrastructure and IT projects
- [About](/es/about) - Professional background and experience
- [Contact](/es/contact) - Contact form powered by Resend API

## Internationalization

The site is fully bilingual (Spanish / English). Spanish is the primary language.
- Spanish: `/es/`
- English: `/en/`
- Posts not yet translated show a language badge and are still accessible.

## Features

- **Bilingual i18n**: Full ES/EN support with Accept-Language based redirect and hreflang SEO tags.
- **Universal Search**: Cmd+K interface powered by Pagefind, indexes blog and projects.
- **Theme Support**: Dark mode by default with light mode toggle and localStorage persistence.
- **RSS Feed**: Auto-generated feed at `/rss.xml` covering all blog posts in both languages.
- **Sitemap**: Intelligent sitemap excluding noindex pages.
- **SEO**: JSON-LD structured data (BlogPosting, Organization, BreadcrumbList), Open Graph, Twitter Cards, hreflang alternates.
- **Contact Form**: Validated form with Resend API integration, sends to hola@dpastor.eu.
- **Obsidian CMS**: Blog content written in Obsidian via Vault CMS workflow with compatible frontmatter.
- **Callouts**: Obsidian callout syntax rendered via rehype-callouts.
- **Image Zoom**: Click-to-zoom on blog images via medium-zoom.
